flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 16 pp at Autry Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (50.0% vs 65.7%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Autry Technology Center are 55% above 6-year earnings ($26.1k → $40.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Autry Technology Center rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (43.3% → 54.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Autry Technology Center rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (246 → 286).
